hero.title: Your finances,
hero.description: Expenss helps you track every yen, manage your budget, and understand where your money actually goes — no confusion, no clutter.
hero.note: No credit card required · Free plan available

features.heading: Everything you need,
features.description: Designed for the real challenges of managing money abroad — currency, receipts, budgets, and more.
features.spendingBreakdownDesc: See exactly where your money goes each month, split by category and date.
features.yenTrackingDesc: Log expenses in JPY natively. No awkward conversions every single time.
features.budgetGoalsDesc: Set a budget, track your pace, and get notified before you overspend.
features.quickLoggingDesc: Add an expense in seconds. Just amount, category, and you're done.

socialProof.testimonial1Quote: Finally an app that doesn't make managing money in Japan a headache. I use it every single day.
socialProof.testimonial2Quote: Helped me realize I was overspending on convenience stores by ¥20k a month. Game changer.

cta.heading: Start tracking today.
cta.description: Free to use. No spreadsheets, no headaches.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.heading: Simple by design.
howItWorks.description: Managing money in Japan as a foreigner is already complicated enough. Expenss keeps it straightforward — log, track, understand.
howItWorks.featuresHeading: Everything you need to stay in control.
howItWorks.ctaDescription: Takes less than a minute to set up.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up with a username, email, and password. Free forever — no credit card required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Enter your income and spending limits in yen. Expenss tracks your pace in real time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add expenses in seconds. Just the amount and category — your dashboard updates instantly.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Compare months, spot patterns, and make smarter decisions about your spending.
howItWorks.feature1Desc: Rent, food, transport, subscriptions — see exactly where every yen goes at a glance.
howItWorks.feature2Desc: Set a budget goal and track your pace so you never overshoot the month.
howItWorks.feature3Desc: Add any expense in seconds. Amount and category — that's all it takes.
howItWorks.feature4Desc: Compare spending month to month and catch patterns before they become problems.
howItWorks.feature5Desc: Log in JPY natively. No awkward conversions, no rounding confusion.
howItWorks.feature6Desc: Get notified when you're approaching your limit — before you cross it.
